changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Retire the legacy data-condition email event table after mail delivery removal

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Retire the Oracle sequence that backed the removed email event table

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Remove retired rule email-recipient storage after rule email delivery removal

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Remove retired rule email-subject storage after rule email delivery removal

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Force retired user/study email compatibility columns to remain empty at the database write boundary
